sourcingNotes.poolAssessment: Category 12 (abstract / texture / detail). Preferred sources generative-leonardo → Unsplash → Pexels. This is the slot where the brief explicitly PREFERS generative — the journal hub is positioned in the style direction document as the cleanest generative use case (restrained texture, strong negative space, no documentary claim). Same reasoning as escape-hub-hero-01: I am not running a generative batch without editor approval of the framework, and the sourced fallback is blocked by Unsplash/Pexels access.
sourcingNotes.blocker: See escape-hub-hero-01. Same two unblock paths.

generativeMetadata.batchStatusReason: Awaiting editor sign-off on generative style framework for Journal surface. This is the highest-priority slot for the first generative batch because the brief is cleanest and the failure mode is the most tolerable (texture is low-stakes compared to a documentary claim).

editorActionsRequested.question: Authorise a 6-variant Leonardo Phoenix generative batch for journal-hub-hero-01 as the pilot generative run? If yes, this is also the slot where the generative-log template gets exercised for the first time and becomes the calibration reference for all future generative batches.
editorActionsRequested.defaultIfNoReply: No generative batch runs without explicit approval.
